# Benchspan

> Benchspan is a platform for benchmarking AI agents. You write a single runner.sh that tells us how to run your agent. We handle everything else.

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](https://docs.benchspan.com/index.md)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.benchspan.com/quickstart.md)

## Onboard Your Agent

- [Onboard Your Agent](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/overview.md)
- [How It Works](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/how-it-works.md)
- [Writing Your runner.sh](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/writing-runner-sh.md)
- [Trajectory Format](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/trajectory.md)
- [Testing with Healthcheck](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/healthcheck.md)
- [Common Issues](https://docs.benchspan.com/agents/common-issues.md)

## Built-in Agents

- [Claude Code](https://docs.benchspan.com/built-in/claude-code.md)
- [OpenHands](https://docs.benchspan.com/built-in/openhands.md)

## Benchmarks

- [Benchmarks Overview](https://docs.benchspan.com/benchmarks/overview.md)

## CLI Reference

- [benchspan auth](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/auth.md)
- [benchspan run](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/run.md)
- [benchspan retry](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/retry.md)
- [benchspan agents](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/agents.md)
- [benchspan runs](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/runs.md)
- [benchspan benchmarks](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/benchmarks.md)
- [benchspan instances](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/instances.md)
- [benchspan init](https://docs.benchspan.com/cli/init.md)
